name: Secrets tooling
description: Installs sops + age + pass for managing secrets in dev / IaC workflows.

sopsVersion.description: sops version. 'latest' tracks GitHub releases; otherwise a tag like 'v3.9.1'.

ageVersion.description: age version. 'latest' tracks GitHub releases; otherwise a tag like 'v1.2.0'.

installPass.description: Install pass (the Unix password manager) + dependencies.
